title: croton ater
intro: Croton ater, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's root is used to make a medicinal paste, which has been used to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea, wounds, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Croton ater include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Croton ater include the root extract, which is often used in traditional medicine to create topical creams, ointments, and oral supplements.
